intended_use: PowerLook® Tomo Detection V2 Software is a computer-assisted detection and diagnosis (CAD) software device intended to be used concurrently by interpreting physicians while reading digital breast tomo
intended_use_full: PowerLook® Tomo Detection V2 Software is a computer-assisted detection and diagnosis (CAD) software device intended to be used concurrently by interpreting physicians while reading digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) exams from compatible DBT systems. The system detects soft tissue densities (masses, architectural distortions and asymmetries) and calcifications in the 3D DBT slices. The detections and Certainty of Finding and Case Scores assist interpreting physicians in identifying soft tissue densities and calcifications that may be confirmed or dismissed by the interpreting physician.
target_condition: Breast cancer (soft tissue densities/masses, architectural distortions, asymmetries, and calcifications)
ground_truth: Radiologist assessment with malignant lesion localization required for correct cancer detection; breast lesion pathology/clinical follow-up
other_metrics: Reading time improvement: 52.7% (95% CI: 41.8%, 61.5%); Case-level sensitivity without CAD: 0.770; Case-level sensitivity improvement with CAD: 0.080 (95% CI: 0.026, 0.134); Lesion-level sensitivity without CAD: 0.769; Lesion-level sensitivity improvement: 0.084 (95% CI: 0.029, 0.139); Specificity without CAD: 0.627; Specificity improvement: 0.069 (95% CI: 0.030, 0.108); AUC without CAD: 0.795; AUC improvement: 0.057 (95% CI: 0.028, 0.087); Recall rate in non-cancer cases without CAD: 0.380; Recall rate with CAD: 0.309; False Positive Rate met design specifications (standalone testing); Sensitivity for calcification-only cases: increased by 0.120 (SE=0.040); Sensitivity for soft tissue density/mixed lesion cases: increased by 0.068 (SE=0.031)
